output_log: Old Maren stoops beside her baskets, sorts out the basics in practiced order, and presses them into your hands one piece at a time.
Thread your catch onto this if you plan to keep fishing.
Old Maren says, "Start with the pole, then mind your bait. I've set you up with fishing pole, fish string, hook, line, worm."
Your fishing pole is already rigged.
You bait your hook with worm.
You cast your line into the water.
You wait for a bite...
You feel a slight tug on the line...
RETURN None
The line jerks violently!
You catch a silver trout weighing 3 stones.
You secure silver trout to your fish string.
You feel your outdoorsmanship settling into perusing.
RETURN None
Could not find 'silver trout from fish string'.
Could not find 'silver trout'.
You sell 1 fishing finds for a total of 2 silvers, 1 copper.
Old Maren says, "You already have the basics. Use what you're carrying before you come asking for more."
Your fishing pole is already rigged.
You bait your hook with worm.
You cast your line into the water.
You wait for a bite...

RETURN None
